commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed; the patch is focused, has no discrete blocking finding, and should proceed through maintainer review and standard merge checks.; Cleared: The diff changes group-context resolution and tests only; it adds no dependency, workflow, script, secret, package, artifact, or new code-execution surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates shared group session resolution to prefer the originating chat target for group/channel contexts whose speaker-shaped `From` lacks an explicit group kind, adds a Feishu regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main Feishu group turns set `From` to `feishu:<sender>` and `OriginatingTo`/`To` to `chat:<group>`, while `resolveGroupSessionKey` derives the group id from `From`.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the patch is focused, has no discrete blocking finding, and should proceed through maintainer review and standard merge checks.
